content:
#chore #claude-code

# Convert scripts to cross-platform Node.js

Completed 2026-03-28. Converted all .sh scripts to .js, added next-card.js, updated hooks.ts to spawn .js via node.

Replace all .sh scripts with .js equivalents so they work on Linux, macOS, and Windows. Add next-card.js to read the first refined card without exposing the full manifest. Update hooks.ts to spawn .js scripts via node.
